task: FALSIFICATION TEST 5 -- PIN f. Try to tighten the China-by-nationality fraction f of the US-held offshore-FC portfolio pool (US holdings of CYM/HKG/VGB securities) below the DP5 [0,0.60] HOLE, and test whether f can be bounded AWAY FROM 0. If bounded away from 0, the f=0 rank-1 degeneracy endpoint that the DP4/DP5 verdict rests on is inadmissible.
read_only_inputs: build/results/dp5_resolution_path.json section 5(c): recorded GCAP Restatement Matrices + Restated Bilateral External Portfolios EXIST and are downloadable; granularity/vintage UNVERIFIED in-page -- this test fetched and inspected the files.

what_was_fetched_today_2026-06-29.got: Located, under 'Redrawing the Map of Global Capital Flows', the download links for 'Restated Bilateral External Portfolios' (DTA/XLSX/README) and 'Restatement Matrices' (DTA/TAR/README); under 'China in Tax Havens', the Figure-1 underlying XLSX and replication README.

29.7 MB xlsx, 398,333 rows. Coppola-Maggiori-Neiman-Schreger, 'Restated Bilateral External Portfolios', December 2022, Version 1.8. THIS IS HOLDINGS-SIDE, COUNTERPART-RESOLVED (matrix-cell-matching): fields Methodology, Year, Investor, Issuer, Asset_Class, Position_Residency (residency-basis US$mn), Restatement_TH_Only / Restatement_Full (same holdings restated to NATIONALITY basis). For Investor=USA, asset classes are split into Common Equity (E), Corporate Bonds (BC), Government Bonds (BG), Asset-Backed Securities (BSF). Years 2007-2020. Source restatements of US TIC + IMF CPIS via Coppola et al. (2021). 25,652 USA-investor rows extracted.

140 MB Stata-118 file, README 'Restatement Matrices for Bilateral External Portfolios', Dec 2022 Version 1.5. Fields: Methodology, Year, Investor, Asset_Class, Destination (residency ISO), Destination_Restated (nationality ISO), Value (share of Investor's holdings of Destination-resident securities reallocated to Destination_Restated; sums to 1 over Destination_Restated per Investor x Destination x Asset_Class x Year). Methodology labels: 1=Enhanced Fund Holdings, 2=Fund Holdings (both US-HOLDINGS-side, investor-specific), 3=Issuance (NOT investor-specific -- issuance-side, the WRONG basis for the matrix cell). Extracted the 360 rows Investor=USA, Destination in {CYM,HKG,VGB}, Destination_Restated=CHN.

Figure 1 underlying data for Clayton et al. (2023) 'China in Tax Havens', June 2023 v1.0. Fig 1a/1b = ISSUANCE-side share of tax-haven-issued securities accounted for by Chinese firms (equities / corporate bonds, by residency CYM/BMU/VGB); Fig 1c/1d = estimated FOREIGN FUNDS' holdings of Chinese-firm securities by residency (USD bn, equities / all bonds). These are NOT the US-holdings-pool denominator; used only to corroborate the issuance-vs-holdings distinction and direction.

issuance_vs_holdings_distinction_resolve.the_matrix_cell_is: US-HOLDINGS-side: the DP2 pool is US-reporter CPIS holdings of CYM/HKG/VGB-resident securities. f must be the China-by-nationality fraction OF THOSE US HOLDINGS.
issuance_vs_holdings_distinction_resolve.the_original_0.60_was: ISSUANCE-side: NBER WP 30865 Fig 1a 'share of securities ISSUED in tax havens accounted for by Chinese firms' (>60% equity 2020). That is the haven's issuance pool, not the US holdings cell -- a different denominator, as the task warned.
issuance_vs_holdings_distinction_resolve.this_test_uses: The HOLDINGS-side, investor=USA Restatement Matrices x USA Position_Residency pool weights. This is the basis that MATCHES the matrix cell. Methodology 3 (Issuance) was explicitly EXCLUDED as wrong-basis.

computation.denominator: Sum over Destination in {CYM,HKG,VGB} and all asset classes of USA Position_Residency (US$mn) from Restated Bilateral External Portfolios -- the US residency-basis holdings of the haven pool (the matrix-cell denominator).
computation.numerator: Sum over the same (Destination, Asset_Class) cells of Position_Residency x Value(USA, Destination, Destination_Restated=CHN, Asset_Class) from the Restatement Matrices -- the portion of those US haven holdings reassigned to CHINESE nationality. Within-pool, contamination-free (China-from-other-destinations is NOT counted).

Fund_Holdings_2020.note: includes ABS (25.5% of pool); ABS->CHN share ~0. This is the MATRIX-COMPARABLE blend (CPIS pool includes ABS).

Fund_Holdings_2019.note: includes ABS (30.9% of pool); ABS->CHN ~0. LOWEST grounded estimate across all methods/years = the maximal-ABS-dilution case.

Enhanced_Fund_Holdings_2020.note: US baseline (adds US insurers); excludes ABS from this pool composition.

time_path_f_2013_to_2020.reading: f is HIGH and RISING toward 2020 in every methodology; the all-time minimum across the whole 2007-2020 window in the matrix-comparable Fund Holdings basis is ~0.36 (2016), never near 0. The latest two vintages (2019, 2020) bracket the floor at 0.489 (FH, max ABS dilution) and the ceiling at 0.708 (EnhFH).

tightest_grounded_interval.construction: Range across the two HOLDINGS-side methodologies (Fund Holdings = ABS-diluted, matches the CPIS pool which contains US-bank ABS via Cayman SPVs; Enhanced Fund Holdings = ABS-excluded composition, adds US insurers) over the two latest available vintages 2019-2020. Lower endpoint 0.49 = Fund Holdings 2019 (maximal ABS dilution). Upper endpoint 0.71 = Enhanced Fund Holdings 2020. Both are directly computed from US-holdings-side counterpart-resolved publisher data, not recalled.
tightest_grounded_interval.narrower_than_prior: YES. Prior bound [0,0.60] collapses on the low side: the floor moves from 0.00 to ~0.49. The interval is now bounded WELL AWAY from 0.
tightest_grounded_interval.distance_of_floor_from_zero: ~0.49 (matrix-comparable Fund Holdings basis); even the 2007-2020 all-time FH minimum (~0.36, 2016) is far from 0.

residual_gaps_carried_as_unverified: VINTAGE: latest GCAP restatement vintage is 2020 (Restated Bilateral External Portfolios v1.8 / Restatement Matrices v1.5, both Dec 2022, data 2007-2020). The DP2 matrix cell is 2025-S1. A 2025-aligned restatement is NOT published by GCAP. f for 2025-S1 is therefore EXTRAPOLATED-IN-DIRECTION-ONLY from the 2019/2020 level; its exact 2025 value is UNVERIFIED. However: the 2013-2020 path is monotone-ish UPWARD since 2016 and never approaches 0, so f<0.49 in 2025 would require an unprecedented collapse with no precedent in the 14-year series. The f=0 endpoint is not supported at ANY observed vintage.

BASIS DIFFERENCE: GCAP Position_Residency restates US TIC + IMF CPIS + commercial (Morningstar/insurer) holdings; the DP2 pool is IMF CPIS US-reporter 2025-S1. The two residency bases are closely related (CPIS is a GCAP input) but not identical at the dollar level; the SHARE f is more robust to this than the level.

POOL-COMPOSITION: GCAP US asset-class split (E/BC/BG/BSF) lets ABS be isolated; the CPIS pool blends these. The Fund Holdings figure (0.49-0.53) is the right matrix-comparable blend because it carries the ~26-31% ABS (which reallocates ~0 to China), pulling f down -- so 0.49 is the conservative (low) grounded floor.
source: Coppola, Maggiori, Neiman, Schreger -- 'Restated Bilateral External Portfolios' (v1.8) and 'Restatement Matrices' (v1.5), globalcapitalallocation.com, data vintage 2007-2020, fetched and parsed 2026-06-29. US-HOLDINGS-side (Investor=USA), counterpart-resolved, Destination in {CYM,HKG,VGB}, Destination_Restated=CHN. Methodology=Fund Holdings (ABS-inclusive, matrix-comparable) and Enhanced Fund Holdings.
reason: A reusable, counterpart-resolved, HOLDINGS-side restatement file EXISTS at the exact granularity needed (US investor x haven residency x China nationality x asset class) and was parsed directly. For THIS specific US-held CYM/HKG/VGB pool the China-by-nationality fraction is f in [0.49, 0.71] across the two latest vintages and never below ~0.36 in any year 2007-2020. f is therefore BOUNDED AWAY FROM 0: the f=0 (zero-China-nationality) endpoint that makes the DP4 operator M=[v_F3|v_F4] rank-1 is NOT in the admissible set for this pool at any observed vintage. The rank-1-at-f=0 degeneracy does not occur on the grounded admissible set. CAVEAT preserved honestly: this is a 2020-vintage pin, not 2025-S1; the exact 2025 value is UNVERIFIED, but no observed vintage admits f near 0, so f=0 is inadmissible on the evidence. This is a FALSIFICATION result on the f-axis only; it does NOT by itself compute a hazard, and the s_usd hole and single-snapshot temporal degeneracy (DP5 paths a, d) are untouched. It removes ONE endpoint (f=0) that the DP4/DP5 rank-1 verdict relied upon, so the verdict reopens on this axis and must be re-derived without the f=0 degeneracy.
scope_limit: READ-ONLY on prior artifacts. This file is the only artifact written (plus raw data under build/data/). dp4_spectrum.json, china_fraction_bound.json, dp5_resolution_path.json are NOT modified. DP6 NOT started. No hazard, separation margin, or distribution computed. The OVERTURN is confined to the admissibility of the f=0 endpoint for this specific pool.
